WARN Information

  • Home
  • Information Center
  • WARN Information
Font Size
Share Page

Please send WARN Notices to:

 

Stephanie Walters
Rapid Response Coordinator
Mississippi Department of Employment Security
1235 Echelon Parkway
Jackson, Mississippi 39213
Email: swalters@mdes.ms.gov

 

To view WARN Reports, select the appropriate link below:

Program Year 2025

April-June 2026
January-March 2026
October-December 2025 
July-September 2025 

Program Year 2024

April-June 2025 
January-March 2025 
October-December 2024 
July-September 2024 

Program Year 2023

April-June 2024
January-March 2024 
October-December 2023 
July-September 2023 

Program Year 2022

April-June 2023 
January-March 2023
October-December 2022
July-September 2022

Program Year 2021

April-June 2022
January-March 2022
October-December 2021
July-September 2021

Program Year 2020

April-June 2021
January-March 2021
October-December 2020
July-September 2020

An equal opportunity employer and program, MDES has auxiliary aids and services available upon request to those with disabilities. Those needing TTY assistance may call 800-582-2233. Funded by the U.S. Department of Labor through the Mississippi Department of Employment Security. For Stevens Amendment details, click here.
